title: Delicate Chicken Paella
description: A traditional Spanish dish with a delicate twist, featuring chicken and Basque rice.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the diced chicken breast and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the Basque rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken broth, diced tomatoes, paprika, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20-25 minutes.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
